context: Tests whether the agent implements the three-layer recommendation strategy (manual overrides → affinity → trending fallback), correct placement configuration per page type, upsell price guardrails, exclusion of out-of-stock and source products, and correct score aggregation.

checklist.name: Manual overrides first
checklist.description: getRecommendations queries manual overrides first and returns them with highest priority — if manual recs fill the limit, affinity layer is skipped

checklist.name: Affinity layer second
checklist.description: Affinity-based results (from product_affinities or equivalent) are used as the second layer when manual overrides don't fill the limit

checklist.name: Trending fallback third
checklist.description: A trending/bestseller fallback is added as the third layer when affinity results don't fill the limit

checklist.name: Default limit is 4
checklist.description: When no limit is provided in the request, getRecommendations defaults to returning 4 results

checklist.name: Exclude out-of-stock
checklist.description: Recommendations filter out products that are out of stock (stockQuantity <= 0 or inactive)

checklist.name: Exclude source products
checklist.description: Source productIds (and any explict excludeIds) are excluded from the results — a product is never recommended alongside itself

checklist.name: Over-fetch 3x
checklist.description: Affinity query fetches limit * 3 candidates to allow for deduplication before slicing to the final limit

checklist.name: Score aggregation
checklist.description: When multiple source products produce the same target, scores are aggregated (summed) rather than taking just the first or highest individual score

checklist.name: Upsell price range
checklist.description: getUpsellCandidates filters products priced between 110% and 150% of the source product price

checklist.name: Upsell ordering
checklist.description: Upsell candidates are ordered by reviewScore descending, then salesCount descending

checklist.name: Checkout limit and maxPrice
checklist.description: PLACEMENT_CONFIG checkout entry has limit of 2 AND a maxPrice of 30 (or equivalent low-price constraint)

checklist.name: Placement types correct
checklist.description: PLACEMENT_CONFIG sets type 'frequently-bought-together' for pdp and 'cross-sell' for cart, checkout, and post-purchase

checklist.name: Checkout risk documented
checklist.description: api-notes.md explains that checkout shows fewer, low-cost items to reduce cart abandonment risk
